title: BlockGameJ
description: Unofficial modpack for PirateSoftware's BlockGame server, including the client mod, optimization mods and a bunch of graphical vanilla friendly mods. Controller options included!
body:
# BlockGame J is:
An **Unofficial** modpack for PirateSoftware's BlockGame server, including the client mod, optimization mods and a bunch of graphical vanilla friendly mods. (Controller support included!)

Modpack is not associated with PirateSoftware nor with the creator of BlockGame Enchanced mod

## [Watch our great Goblin King!](https://www.twitch.tv/piratesoftware)

### Mod List:
<details>
<summary>Game Improvements</summary>
  
  [BlockGame Enhanced](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockgame-enhanced)
  
  [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)
  
  [Midnight Controls](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols)
  
  [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
  
  [Mouse Wheelie](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-wheelie)
  
  [Tooltip Scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltip-scroll)
  
  [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
  
  [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
  
</details>
<details>
<summary>Visual/Audio Improvements</summary>
  
  [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
  
  [Blur](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric)
  
  [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
  
  [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
  
  [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
  
  [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
  
  [Physics Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/physicsmod)
  
  [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)
  
  [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
  
  [Visually](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
  
</details>
<details>
<summary>Fun Additions</summary>
  
  [Advanced Compass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-compass)
  
  [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot)
  
  [Replay Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod)
  
  [Spyglass Astronomy](https://modrinth.com/mod/spyglass-astronomy)
  
</details>
<details>
<summary>Libraries/Configs/API</summary>
  
  [Chime](https://modrinth.com/mod/chime)
  
  [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
  
  [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
  
  [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables)
  
</details>

[Resource Pack used!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/blockgame-textures-chime)
